title: Endless Backrooms
description: One Backrooms mod, one large Backrooms mod
body:
_"They say that it's an afterlife–not for people, but for places. For every chain storefront demolished, every retail outlet bought out, every dead mall razed to the ground. A limbo for every building without purpose, those in-between spaces. Endless structures so unfathomable, yet so clearly man-made. Edges in the curtains of memory, corners that open up at the seams of reality to let the unlucky wanderer in._

_Be careful out there, for the footsteps that fill these halls may not only be your own."_

![V1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdd914ad45b5e23eca4223f64e3fa5b410dae8c0.png)

Endless Backrooms is a mod based on the Backrooms: endless liminal spaces with different levels of difficulty, their own rules, and structures that can be stable or completely chaotic.

The mod is mainly focused on exploration, so it does not add interactive decorative blocks like those in Mr.Crayfish's Furniture or HandCrafted. However, the [modpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/endless-backrooms-modpack) of the same name uses additional mods for construction. Although these are not included in the base mod, the structures saved in NBT do use them, so they will appear correctly within the modpack.

The project has no defined limit, so the plan is to add as many levels, entities, objects, and mechanics as possible. There will be much more content in the future.

# Current Content – V1

## Levels
_At the moment, there are no levels present in this version of the mod._

## Entities
- Facelings
  - Adult Facelings
  - Child Facelings

## Objects
- Almond Pack
  - Almond Water
  - Almonds
